items.text: 因此，在我们开始向场景中添加几何图形之前，我认为在创建场景时进行进度渲染非常重要。 So before we start adding geometry into our scene, I think it's really important to make progress renders as you're creating your scene. 这将确保您走在正确的轨道上。你会惊讶地发现，在完成环境布置的过程中，有多少时候你会退步。 This will make sure you're on the right track. You'd be surprised how many times you can take a step backwards as you're finishing your environment. 这样就能保持稳定的进度，你就能在几次渲染中看到场景的变化。 So this will keep a steady flow of progress and you'll be able to see your scene transform in a couple renders. 我希望你能习惯使用 "影片渲染队列"，并从这里进行渲染，哪怕只是渲染静帧。 And I want you to get used to using Movie Render Queue and rendering out of here, even if it's just for still frames. 因此，如果你点击左下角的拍板，就会打开 "电影渲染队列"。 So if you click on this clapper board on the bottom left, this will open up Movie Render Queue. 以防万一，如果点击这三个点，就会出现一个传统的 "电影场景捕捉 "系统。 Now just in case, if you click these three dots, there is a legacy Movie Scene Capture system. 但这是在虚幻 4 中使用的，功能较少，所以您一定要使用 "电影渲染队列"。 But this was used in Unreal 4 and has a lot less features, so you definitely want to be using Movie Render Queue. 因此，当你点击这个按钮时，它会以你的序列名称创建一个新的渲染任务。 So when you click this, it'll create a new render job with the name of your sequence. 它会自动选择从哪个序列创建的，并抓取主关卡地图。 It'll automatically select the sequence that this was created from, and it'll grab our master level map. 然后单击 "Unsaved Config（未保存配置）"，查看所有渲染设置。 And just click Unsaved Config to look at all of our render settings. 现在，左上角的 "添加设置 "按钮将为我们提供所有不同的选项。 Now this Add Settings button on the top left is where we'll have all of our different options. 我们将在最终渲染该环境时详细介绍每项功能，但现在我们只使用默认设置。 We'll go in detail on each of these when we go into our final render for this environment, but for now we'll just use the defaults. 现在，如果我们想渲染视口中看到的内容，这就是所谓的延迟渲染，它会自动添加到场景中。 Now if we want to render what we're seeing in our viewport, that's what's known as a deferred render, which is automatically added to your scene. 我们可以添加路径追踪渲染。我们稍后将讨论路径追踪渲染。 We can add path traced renders. We'll get into path tracing renders later. 但这些延迟渲染选项卡是由游戏引擎渲染器生成的不同 AOV。 But these deferred render tabs are different AOVs generated by the Game Engine Renderer. 所以我们暂时不需要 AOV。我们选中了 "渲染主通道"，这就是我们所需要的。 So we don't need AOVs for now. We have Render Main Pass as checked, and that's all we'll need. 如果你好奇，这些后处理材料就是我们可以添加不同数据 AOV 的地方。 If you're curious, these Post Process Materials are where we can add different data AOVs. 默认情况下，我们有 "世界深度 "和 "运动矢量"。 And by default, we have World Depth and we have Motion Vectors. 但您必须渲染出 EXR 图像才能获得这些图像，因此您可以在 Nuke 等合成软件中使用这些图像。 But you have to render out an EXR image to get these, so you could use those in a compositing software like Nuke. 因此，我们可以保持输出目录中的所有内容不变，以便开始运行。 So just to get up and running, we can keep everything in our output directory the same. 如果我点击这里的三个点，就会跳转到项目内部的位置。 If I hit these three dots here, we'll navigate to where this is inside of our project. 它会默认进入 "保存 "文件夹下的项目文件夹，并创建一个名为 "电影渲染 "的新文件夹。 And it'll default to our project folder underneath Saved, and it'll create a new folder called Movie Renders. 我将在那里再添加一个 Raya01 文件夹。 And I'll just add another Raya01 folder there. 因此，如果你看到这里，我们可以在括号中加入一些术语，为我们的渲染自动命名。 So if you see here, there's a couple terms we can put in between brackets to auto-name our renders. 底部的列表包括序列名称、任务名称、帧速率以及版本和帧编号、 This list on the bottom here, like Sequence Name, Job Name, Frame Rate, as well as Version, Frame Number, 所有这些不同的选项都是我们可以放在这两者之间的。 all of these different options are all things we could put in between here. 因此，如果我想要我的相机名称，只需右键单击这个名称，将其复制并粘贴到这里。 So if I wanted my camera name, I would just right-click this, copy it, and paste it here. 如果输入两个括号，也会出现下拉菜单，但我们还是使用默认的序列名称。 You also have this drop-down if you type in two brackets, but we'll go back to the default of Sequence Name. 我们用下划线和括号代替.frameNumber，将其改为 Version。 And instead of.frameNumber, we'll go underscore, bracket, and we'll change it to Version. 现在，让我们取消选中 "覆盖现有输出"。 Now let's just uncheck Override Existing Output. 虚幻应该足够聪明，每次都能知道我们使用的是什么版本，但是为了保护我们自己，我打算取消选中。 Unreal should be smart enough to know what version we're on each time, but just to safeguard ourselves, I'm going to uncheck that. 对于回放范围，默认情况下，它会渲染 Sequencer 中绿色和红色输入和输出点之间的任何内容。 And for the Playback Range, by default, it'll render whatever's between our green and red in and out points within Sequencer. 您可以使用左右括号作为热键来更改这些参数。 And you can change these with the left and right bracket as a hotkey. 但现在，我先把它撤消，我们只需要渲染第一帧画面。 But for now, I'll undo that, and we just need to render our first frame. 让我们回到 "影片渲染队列"。我们将设置一个自定义播放范围。 So let's go back to Movie Render Queue. We'll set a custom Playback Range. 因此，我将自定义星形边框设置为 0，然后将自定义终点边框设置为 1。 So I have my custom star frame at 0, and I'll set my custom end frame to 1. 最后我们要做的一件事是，有时虚幻需要对渲染进行预热。 One last thing we'll want to do, sometimes Unreal needs to warm up its render. 像 Lumen 或 Temporal Super Resolution（虚幻 5 的抗锯齿方法）需要一些时间来预热。 Things like Lumen or Temporal Super Resolution, which is Unreal 5's anti-aliasing method, take some time to warm up. 因此，我们需要添加一些引擎热身帧。 So we'll need to add some Engine Warmup Frames. 因此，我们有渲染预热计数和引擎预热计数。 So we have Render Warmup Count and Engine Warmup Count. 渲染预热计数实际上会事先渲染帧，但不会保存任何帧。 The Render Warmup Count will actually render out the frames beforehand, but it won't save any of them. 而 "引擎热身计数 "只会在此处设置的帧数内运行游戏时钟。 Whereas the Engine Warmup Count will just run the game clock for however many frames you put here. 因此，像尼亚加拉粒子特效这样的东西可以运行，但我们并不一定需要渲染它们。 So things like Niagara Particle Effects will run, but we don't necessarily need to render those. 我们只需要它们缓存在我们的场景中。 We just need them to cache in our scene. 为了安全起见，我将 "渲染预热次数 "改为 64，其他一切保持不变。 So I'll just change the Render Warmup Count to 64, just to be safe, and we'll keep everything else the same. 现在，我们要保存这个预设，这样就可以继续使用了。 Now we want to save this preset so we can keep going back to it. 因此，让我们将其保存在这里，然后转到 UEVFX、序列，创建一个名为 Configs 的新文件夹。 So let's save it here and go to UEVFX, Sequences, and let's create a new folder called Configs. 我们称之为 MRQ 封锁渲染。然后按接受。 And we'll call this MRQ Blockout Render. And press Accept. 现在，当我们进入 "影片渲染队列 "时，就会看到这个下拉菜单，所有预设都在这里。 And now when we're in Movie Render Queue, we have this dropdown and we'll have all of our presets right here. 现在我们有了第一个预设，点击 "渲染"。 Now that we have our first preset, let's hit Render. 第一次使用 "影片渲染队列 "时，它通常会让你编译着色器。 And the first time you use Movie Render Queue, it'll usually have you compile shaders. 所以，这只是过程的一部分，但在你第一次这样做之后，就不应该再发生了。 So that's just part of the process, but after you do it for the first time, it shouldn't happen again. 现在，我第一次渲染这个蓝图时，Echo 在场景中跳动。 And now the first time I rendered out this blueprint, Echo bounced around the scene. 这是因为该资产是作为游戏控制器创建的。 And this is because this asset was created as a game controller. 因此，我向下滚动到底部，在 "激活 "选项下取消了 "角色移动"。 So I just scrolled down to the bottom here, and under Activation, I deactivated Character Movement. 如果我们想从编辑器中打开任何蓝图，有两种快速方法。 If we want to open up any blueprint from the editor, we have two quick ways to do that. 您可以右键单击该图形图标，打开蓝图编辑器，或者按 Ctrl-E 键。 You can right-click on this graph icon and open the Blueprint Editor, or you can hit Ctrl-E. 我们可以看到，一开始就执行了 "开始播放 "事件。 And we can see at the very beginning, this Event Begin Play executes. 我们有两个不同的剧本。 And we have two different scripts going on. 第一个是 Echo 被移到了地板上，如果我双击这个，就能看到这里到底发生了什么。 The first one is that Echo is moved to the floor, and if I double-click this, I can see exactly what's going on here. 但从这一设置中，我看不出她会蹦蹦跳跳。 But nothing from this setup would tell me that she would bounce around. 但是，如果您看到这个 "设置移动模式 "和这个 "角色移动参考"、 But if you see this Set Movement Mode and this Character Movement Reference, 这是指该字符移动组件，它是一些用于控制字符的 C++ 代码 this is in reference to this Character Movement Component, which is some C++ code that's used to control characters 以及行走速度等设置参数。 and things like walking speed with some set parameters. 因此，在这种情况下，如果完全禁用这个功能，我们就不会将她用作游戏控制器输入。 So by disabling this entirely, we're not using her as a game controller input in this case. 因此，这应该能修复我们的渲染。 So this should fix our renders. 我们现在可以做的另一件事，就是在动画模式的顶部、 Another thing we can do for now, at the top here in Animation Mode, 默认设置为使用动画蓝图。 by default, it's set to use Animation Blueprint. 而动画蓝图则用于驱动游戏中的动画。 And Animation Blueprints are used to drive animations within gameplay. 因此，您可以创建新的节点图，告诉角色蓝图要播放哪些动画 So you can create new node graphs that tell this character blueprint what animations to play 基于角色的状态，无论是奔跑、行走还是跳跃。 based on the state of that character, whether they're running or walking or jumping. 您不能将其用于视觉特效或渲染，只能用于游戏。 You do not use this for VFX or rendering, only for gameplay. 这些都是简单的逻辑树和状态机，可以在游戏过程中调整角色的动画效果。 These are simple logic trees and state machines that will adjust how the characters are animated during gameplay. 他们将使用动画资产，并决定使用哪个动画是正确的。 They'll use animation assets and decide which animation is the right one to use. 所以，刚开始学的时候，根本不用担心学不会。 So don't even worry about learning this whatsoever when you're first getting started. 因此，我为不同的岩石地面纹理制作了几个额外的位移网格 So I've gone ahead and I've made a couple extra displacement meshes for different rocky ground textures 我在 Quixel 中找到的。 that I found within Quixel. 因此，我们有几种选择，可以将它们带入我们的场景。 So we have a couple options that we can bring into our scene. 现在，有一点要注意，因为我们做的这些是两米乘两米长的、 Now, one thing to note here, because we made these two meters by two meters long, 如果我将这里的抓取设置为 50 个单位，然后 Alt 并拖动这些资产、 if I set my snapping to 50 units here and I Alt and drag these assets across, 所有这些纹理都是平铺的。 all of these textures are tiling. 这是因为我将它们移动到了精确的像素距离、 And because I'm moving them an exact number of pixels away, 我们的两项资产之间应该有一个完美的交集。 we should have a perfect intersection between our two assets. 当我们把几何体移入洞穴时，这将有助于我们铺贴瓷砖。 And this will help us tile our geometry when we move it into our cave. 因此，我并不担心这层地板是否一一对应。 So I'm not concerned with matching this floor perfectly one-to-one. 我只想看到，与我们的角色相比，什么看起来最好、最可信。 I just want to see whatever looks best and believable when compared to our character here. 让我们来看看这些不同平面的实际效果。 So let's look at these different floor planes in action. 因此，我们可以看到这幅画有点大，但它可能具有我们想要的形状语言。 So we can see this one is a bit big, but it might have the shape language that we want. 因此，如果我将其缩放为 1，让我们看看在我们的场景中平铺效果如何。 So if I scale this down to one, let's see how this looks tiled in our scene. 太棒了所以我们现在就用这个，这是 MI 罗马石墙 4K。 Awesome. So we'll go with this one for now, which is the MI Roman stone wall 4K. 让我们继续举例说明这一点。 And let's just continue to instance this perfectly across our floor. 好的现在我们有了一个漂亮的地平面。 All right. And now we have a pretty nice ground plane working here. 因此，下一步就是在我们的墙壁上制作一些高质量的 3D 位移。 So the next step is to create some high quality 3D displacement on our walls. 但我们可以从参考图片中看到，我们在不同的设计元素中都有更多的细节、 But we can see in the reference image here that we have a lot more detail in different design elements, 同时还有这种方砖位移贯穿其中。 while also having this square brick displacement running through it. 右侧有一条走廊。 And we have a hallway on the right side here. 我们还得为走廊的开口做一些装饰、 We'll also have to create some trim pieces for the opening of that hallway there, 以及我们隧道的每一段周围。 and around each segment of our tunnel. 所以，让我们先从最难的事情开始，也就是这些墙壁、 So let's start with the hardest thing first, which is going to be these walls, 并找到有趣而简单的方法来创造这些设计元素、 and finding interesting and easy ways to create these design elements, 这在 Quixel 资产中是不存在的。 which won't exist in the Quixel assets.
